title: [phase:critique] [family:ui-runtime-review] [provider_hint:subagent] Review the current Happy production resolution. Facts: production /happy/ serves updated HTML with Live Session wired to /cockpit; /cockpit returns 200; unauthenticated GET /api/happy/state,/events,/task-detail return 401 by design...
summary_text: - **Flaky failure risk (smallest concrete fix):** `smoke-happy-login.js` generates a temporary password as ``TempPass!${randomUUID().slice(0, 8)}``, but `PasswordSchema` requires at least one digit. The random UUID slice is not guaranteed to include digits, so the script can fail intermittently at `hashPassword(...)`. - Script: [smoke-happy-login.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cloudflare-workers-hub-deploy/scripts/smoke-happy-login.js:137) - Validator: [password-auth.ts](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cloudflare-workers-hub-deploy/src/utils/password-auth.ts:32) - **Minimal change:** make the default password include a guaranteed digit (e.g. prefix/suffix `1`) before hashing. No other concrete reliability gaps stood out in the related smoke scripts for this environment.
